title: It Is Not A Word Spoken
content:
It is not a word spoken,
Few words are said;
Nor even a look of the eyes
Nor a bend of the head,

But only a hush of the heart
That has too much to keep,
Only memories waking
That sleep so light a sleep.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Sara Teasdale delivers a powerful performance in "It Is Not A Word Spoken"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
